pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-T-004 (Core Abilities) scores 0.436 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Warehouse Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Core Abilities KSA AB-T-004 as a discrete competency for Data Warehouse Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Data Warehouse Architect market data. General ability without data warehouse architecture-specific grounding. Score 0.436 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. General ability without data warehouse architecture-specific grounding. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: General ability without data warehouse architecture-specific grounding.
